since_last: 36% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.28%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.90% · BTC -1.43% · Gold -2.18% · Nasdaq100 -1.45%. 36% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.28%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.28%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -9.60%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +5.30%, AVAV +3.15%, SKHY +3.04%, FIX +1.90%, SMCI +1.85%. Laggards: TSLA -9.60%, GOOGL -5.87%, AMZN -3.51%, META -3.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.10% at $115.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
